plan.md.text: Done across the four spots: dropped the per-stage branch model, rewrote the Branch strategy section to single-branch sequential commits merging into runtime2 at the end, removed the branch-trunk and branch-lifetime questions from Open questions, and updated summary.md. Same change in spirit for all four comments.

plan.md.text: Picked serializers-stage-6-finish as stage 1 — closes the channels-Stage-6 drift before any other stage touches Channels. keepalive-collection moves to stage 3 (still in Tier 1, still teaches the pattern, just second). Settled in plan.md.

plan.md.text: Default one stage per session, flexible — Tier 1 stages may double up if appetite holds, Tier 3 stages (App.Run especially) probably need multi-session. Decide each one when carving its stage brief, no rigid cadence.
plan.md.author: architect
